findings.location: s1 — Step 1: リクエスト単体テストコードの追加
findings.description: The test method implementation using Nablarch's `execute()` API is omitted. The source provides the full test body showing the `execute("testRW11AC0202")` call pattern, which is the correct way to invoke a request unit test in Nablarch. This is a code example demonstrating a required usage pattern.
